meaning: 杜尚别[塔吉克斯坦首都]
examples: Dushanbe is the capital and the largest city.
They cost $700 in Dushanbe and we sell them for $1, 100.
All cases are reported from the south-west of the country, including the capital city Dushanbe.
Two days later, a helicopter chartered by the Aga Khan network ferried the women and children away to Dushanbe.
For flight details, join the queue of journalists, chancers and do-gooders clustered outside the Afghan embassy on Bakhtar Street, Dushanbe.
